text.title: DDD Repositories Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping query shape + aggregate scope to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Query is by identity (id / external key) only?

conclusion.verdict: add a method on the Repository interface: find_by_id / find_by_external_key

branch.question: Does the caller need to mutate the result (write path)?

conclusion.verdict: re-fetch by id after looking up via Query Service; mutate aggregate; save through Repository
skip-this-methodology: arbitrary query belongs in a Query Service / Read Model, not on the Repository

text.example: identity_only=true (find_by_id) → add Repository.find_by_id; service loads aggregate, calls Order.ship(), Repository.save().
